query: SELECT id, title, LENGTH(sheetMusicAbc) as abc_length, LENGTH(lyrics) as lyrics_length, LEFT(sheetMusicAbc, 300) as abc_preview, RIGHT(sheetMusicAbc, 200) as abc_end FROM songs WHERE sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id
